title: Studying Mongolian
markdown:
In case you are in Washington DC and are wondering what good it is to know Mongolian, well you can use it to listen to the [radio](https://radiotime.com/region/c_101275/Mongolia.aspx).  With [this application, you can record](http://applian.com/sound-recorder/) it to an MP3 file and listen to it on the metro.  And of course [pop music from YouTube](http://se.youtube.com/watch?v=Lfzy4nidOCg).


My books still haven’t arrived, I’m hoping they arrive before next Monday, ’cause I got a [Mongolian study group](http://mongolian.meetup.com/36/) posted for that day.
